postReview.title: Canada 1-1 Guatemala (5-6 pens): Morales the hero in Gold Cup shoot-out
postReview.description: Guatemala will feature in the Gold Cup semi-finals for the first time since 1996 after they overcame Canada on penalties in Minneapolis.

QAData.question: Who won between Canada and Guatemala on Sun, 29 Jun 2025 20:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Guatemala won 1–1 (6–5) over Canada after penalties on Sun, 29 Jun 2025 20:00:00 GMT.
